THE MOTION WAS NOT SERVED WITHIN THE APPROPRIATE TIME REQUIREMENTS OF CCP 1005 FOR A HEARING DATE OF OCTOBER 24, 2017. SANCTIONS DENIED. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM.
